1.content:
"I can't believe that I am here!" Charz the Charizard says as he spills a cola on his already tainted shirt. "Not again." he walks blindly along the decorated path past the library as he tries to clean up the stain. He hears moaning and muffled voices some distance away, pulling him to the source as he rounds a bend and looks up after realizing that he can't get it out. He bumps into the Principle of all pokemon.

Charz bounces off the principal and falls to his plump butt. As a cold cup of water splashes down on his head, Charz groaned at the cold and the water. After the pain and shock swiftly fade, The Charizard looks up to see who he collided with and instantly coward as he looks up to Lugia.

The blue bellied Pokemon looked at Charz for a moment, bewildered, before offering his huge hand to the Charizard. Dumbfounded, Charz's arm acted on its own and reached for the hand.

"You really need to watch where you are going, Mr, Ignitus," He says as his white fingers wrap and consume the Zard's hand before he pulls him off the floor.

"Let me get you to your first class” Lugia says as he pulls Charz into his feet. Charz follows closely behind the principle as he takes several lefts and rights before opening a door to...
1.title: First day

12.content:
Charz blindly walks into the open door before he notices he entered the staff supplies closet and confusingly turns to the Principal.

“Mr. Lugia. I believe that we must have taken a wrong turn somewhere. This is the supplies closet.”

“Just a little detour. Before I get you to class, crawl head first into my ass” he finishes before turning and raising his tail to expose a white donut of an ass.

“But I am going to be late to Vore 101 with Mr. lyco.” Charz exclaims as he stands frozen by shock of the first Pokémon to eat him is the Principal.

“Well you better hurry then or I will just choose for you” Lugia responded
12.title: The supplies closet

121.content:
Charz nervously swallows, before kneeling down and crawl closer to Lugia’s tailhole. Watching the tailhole clench and relax caused the young charizard to regret his choice before he pushes his snout with the tailhole.

The tailhole only kiss his nose at first as the musk fills Charz’s lungs. He then pushes his snout forward into the tailhole and watches as it opens inward as he “willingly” is eaten by the hole.
121.title: Obey

info.brief_description: Will you be able to make it to graduation day or will you become pudge
info.description:
Congratulations Charz,

You have been selected amongst other Pokémon to join us at Vore University. Please note you must follow out guidelines to ensure you make it to Graduation. The guidelines are;

you can not devour any classmates during passing period or off campus.

You must obey your teacher’s directions within safety protameters.

You must submit to any punishment our staff feels adiquit.

Lastly, enjoy yourself within the campus.

This story will contain all types of vore except hard digestion. Gooey digestion or implied is ok however. The main character will be unchanging but the world and other characters are free to change.
